channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lime Bike (?), 10th April
item.description:
1 electric bike (Lime I think), left on its side around this part of the car park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car?, 10th April
item.description:
This car has been parked in this location for around 2 months now, as far as I'm aware. The car is taxed and has an MOT until August this year, but the car hasn't moved and is a really bad state (it looks abandoned). Its also parked in a bay that is interfering with current road works (that just started yesterday) on Albemarle Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in Hankey Place Gardens, 10th April
item.description:
Found a dead fox in Hankey Place Gardens while walking past the garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hankey Place, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One way sign turned away from traffic, 10th April
item.description:
Facing the pavement, only cycle lane sign visible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Barge House Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign light turned atound, 10th April
item.description:
Not lighting up the sign properly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marigold Alley, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A frame add blocking entire pavement, 10th April
item.description:
On side Street irresponsibly blocking the entire pavement so that disabled and elderly people cannot use the pavement in order to safely walk in the area. This is a public space and should be for the public not an advertising hoarding area for restaurants. It is perfect perfectly feasible that the restaurants could put the A-frame outside of their restaurants along the lane instead.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatfields, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak, 10th April
item.description:
Water has been leaking through the pavement outside approx 194a East Barnet Road. It has been like this for many weeks. Please fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 206, East Barnet Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th April
item.description:
Dumped household items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gateley Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose rubbish beds and draws in communal walk way, 10th April
item.description:
Loose rubbish beds in communal walkway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Lovelinch Close, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thought someone was moving out but it’s been like this for weeks!, 10th April
item.description:
Blocking access for cars / fire brigade rear access. Looks horrible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Esmeralda Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 10th April
item.description:
A single bed mattress has been dumped at corner Woodlands Park Road and Frobisher St. SE109XA
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodlands Park Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Eynsham Drive end of pathway that leads up to Boxgrove Road: black sacks of rubbish., 10th April
item.description:
Black sack is on grass verge that faces Lidl store. Usual dumping place.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped by tenants. HMO issue, 10th April
item.description:
Rubbish been there nearly a week. Starting to smell. Already reported by council have not actioned. Also can tenants of this HMO be educated in bin day awareness

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture near to 99 Godstow Road., 10th April
item.description:
SECOND report. First report 9259889 8/4/26 marked as “Fixed” on 9/4/26, yet furniture is still on grass verge. Please explain how this has happened.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Salusbury Road by car park, 10th April
item.description:
Street name sign destroyed New street sign for Salusbury Road needed Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sacks and general waste on street, 10th April
item.description:
Black sacks and general waste have been on the street for over a week, with no sign of it being cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dylways, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cash for any car fly posted sign, 10th April
item.description:
Cash for any car fly posted sign up for over 10 months, multiple reports still not removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Parry Street, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole near drain, 10th April
item.description:
Usual pothole, will get bigger with tome

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side of 120 Godstow Road: seat of chair., 10th April
item.description:
SECOND report. First report 9259851 8/4/26 marked as fixed on 9/4/26, but chair seat is still under tree on grass verge (see photo). Please explain why this report has been marked as “Fixed.”

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrow Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 10th April
item.description:
Dumped mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burcharbro Road, London
